title: Gardon's Guns Pack
description: New Powerful Guns to Minecraft! Get to the professional shooter!
body:
#Gardon's Guns Pack by Gardon

The modification adds to Minecraft many types of new firearms grenades and a vest! Each of the new weapons is divided into groups and each of them has its own shooting properties, shooting distance, shooting power or special abilities! Weapons require ammunition exactly to which group the given weapon is assigned!

#Ending

The modification is a really nice change and I'm sure many of you will love the new weapons and accessories I've added!
